# Micah Shu

> Freelance web developer and designer based in Berthoud, CO. Specializing in custom websites, full-stack web applications, Shopify storefronts, WordPress builds, and workflow automation for small businesses and founders.

## About

Micah Shu is a developer and designer offering custom-built websites, web applications, and digital tooling. Work spans the full stack — Next.js and TypeScript on the front end, Node/serverless and PostgreSQL on the back, and WordPress when it's the right fit. Based in Northern Colorado, primarily serving small businesses and local clients in the Fort Collins area.

## Services

- [Web Development](/services/web-development): Custom marketing sites and content-driven builds. Starting at $3,000 one-time or $200/mo. Includes custom design, mobile-responsive layout, on-page SEO, contact form, Core Web Vitals optimization, and 30 days post-launch support.
- [WordPress Development](/services/wordpress-development): Custom WordPress builds for clients who need to manage their own content. Starting at $3,000 one-time or $200/mo. Includes custom theme (no templates), block editor setup, on-page SEO, security hardening, and 30 days post-launch support. Sub-service of Web Development.
- [App Development](/services/app-development): Full-stack web applications — database, auth, APIs, admin tooling. Starting at $8,000 one-time or $600/mo. Built on Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.
- [Ecommerce](/services/ecommerce): Custom Shopify storefronts and headless builds. Starting at $4,000 one-time or $300/mo. Includes store setup, custom theme, checkout optimization, and on-page SEO.
- [Tooling & Automation](/services/tooling-automation): Internal tools, scripts, and automated workflows. Starting at $1,500. API integrations, scheduled tasks, error logging, and documentation.
- [Local SEO](/services/local-seo): Google Business Profile, local citation building, on-page SEO, and structured data for local businesses. Starting at $500/mo.
- [Maintenance](/services/maintenance): Monthly retainer for WordPress sites — updates, security monitoring, uptime, and up to 2 hrs/mo of content edits. Starting at $200/mo. Includes hosting.

## À La Carte Add-Ons

- [Web Hosting](/services/hosting): Managed hosting for small sites. $25/mo. Includes SSL, uptime monitoring, and DNS configuration. Pairs with any web project or maintenance plan.
- [CMS Integration](/services/cms-integration): Add content management (WordPress or headless) to an existing site. $400 one-time. Includes setup, content entry, training walkthrough, and documentation.
- [Hourly Work](/services/hourly): For one-off fixes, consults, and tasks that don't fit a full project. $75/hr. No minimum commitment.

## Projects

- [Zero Gravity Marketing](/projects/zgm-rebuild): Full migration of a 150+ page WordPress site to a headless Next.js architecture. Tags: Headless, Next.js, React, Tailwind, WordPress.
- [Mancini Beverage](/projects/mancini-beverage): Custom WordPress site for an alcohol beverage distributor with a custom age verification gate. Tags: PHP, WordPress.
- [React Landing Page](/projects/react-landing-page): Conceptual landing page with full-screen menu interaction and animated section transitions. Tags: React, Tailwind.
- [Maintenance Dashboard](/projects/maintenance-dashboard): Internal tool managing automated maintenance for 50+ WordPress sites — WP CLI updates, Sucuri scans, Ghost Inspector tests, Slack/Asana alerting. Tags: Next.js, Express, Tailwind, WordPress.
- [Portfolio v2](/projects/portfolio-v2): Custom WordPress portfolio on the Timber framework. Twig templates, AlpineJS filtering. Tags: PHP, Tailwind, WordPress.
- [Portfolio v1](/projects/portfolio-v1): First Next.js portfolio. Light/dark mode, clean layout. Tags: Next.js, React, Tailwind.
- [stlpropertypros.com](/projects/stlpropertypros-com): WordPress site for a St. Louis construction company. Portfolio section and lead-gen layout. Tags: PHP, WordPress.
- [SEO Reporting Tool](/projects/seo-reporting-tool): Internal keyword ranking tracker with scheduled reports and multi-site support. Tags: Next.js, React, Tailwind, Python.
- [petreefs.com](/projects/petreefs): Single-page WooCommerce storefront for a specialty reef product. Tags: PHP, WooCommerce, WordPress.

## Blog

- [ZGM Rebuild](/blog/zgm-rebuild): Case study on migrating a 150+ page WordPress site to headless Next.js.
- [Mancini Beverage](/blog/mancini-beverage): Project writeup for the Mancini Beverage website build.
- [React Landing Page](/blog/react-landing-page): Behind the scenes on the React/Framer Motion landing page concept.
- [App Router Patterns](/blog/app-router-patterns): Engineering post on Next.js App Router patterns.
- [Design Tokens & Editorial](/blog/design-tokens-editorial): Design post on using design tokens for an editorial aesthetic.
